name: Wayports
publisher: Wayports, Inc., Interlink France SAS, Interlink Inc.
short_description: Generate your avatar and congregate in a virtual setting, with collaboration tools and an emphasis on better audio, for better messages. Create your public or private rooms and hold events in Wayports!
detailed_description: Generate your avatar and join a unique virtual place for seamless collaboration. A wayport is a transit port, a teleporting device in our virtual environment, that you can use to get to your destination faster. In Wayports, you can create public or private rooms and hold events, conferences and a lot more. We are working on different features and spaces that will be launched soon.
about_the_game: Generate your avatar and join a unique virtual place for seamless collaboration.
